zh.Royston, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾羅伊斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes於大約1554年出生在英國艾可時，她的父親Roger Blakiston of Gibside40歲，母親Elizabeth Marley33歲。她於1568年與Roger Hewes在英國艾可波金結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1608年7月26日之前在英國艾可波金，埋葬在英國艾可波金。

zh-hans.Royston, Hertfordshire, England: 英国賀特福爾羅伊斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes于大约1554年出生在英国艾可时，她的父亲Roger Blakiston of Gibside40岁，母亲Elizabeth Marley33岁。她于1568年与Roger Hewes在英国艾可波金结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1608年7月26日之前在英国艾可波金，埋葬在英国艾可波金。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes was born about 1554, in Essex, England, her father, Roger Blakiston of Gibside, was 40 and her mother, Elizabeth Marley, was 33. She married Roger Hewes in 1568, in Bocking, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died before 26 July 1608, in Bocking, Essex, England, and was buried in Bocking, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes est née environ 1554, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, Roger Blakiston of Gibside, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Marley, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Hewes en 1568, à Bocking, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 26 juillet 1608, à Bocking, Essex, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Bocking, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes um 1554 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Blakiston of Gibside 40 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Marley 33. Sie hat 1568 in Bocking, Essex, England Roger Hewes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 26. Juli 1608 in Bocking, Essex, England und wurde in Bocking, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes è nata il circa 1554 nel Essex, England, sua padre, Roger Blakiston of Gibside, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Marley, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Roger Hewes nel 1568, nel Bocking, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 26 luglio 1608, nel Bocking, Essex, England, e fu sepolta a Bocking, Essex, England.

ja.Royston, Hertfordshire, England: イギリスハートフォードシュアイアロイストン
ja.Bocking, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスボクイング
ja.lifeSummary: Agnesが約1554年にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Roger Blakiston of Gibsideは40歳，母Elizabeth Marleyは33歳であった。1568年にイギリスエセックスボクイングでRoger Hewesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1608年7月26日以前にイギリスエセックスボクイングで死去し，イギリスエセックスボクイングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes(이)가 대략 1554년 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Blakiston of Gibside(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Marley(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1568년 영국 에세스 보킨그에서 Roger Hewes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1608년 7월 26일 이전 영국 에세스 보킨그에서 사망했으며 영국 에세스 보킨그에 묻혔다.

mn.about 1554–before 26 July 1608: ойролцоогоор 1554 он–1608 оны Долоодугаар сарын 26–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes nasceu aproximadamente 1554, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Blakiston of Gibside, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Marley, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Hewes em 1568, em Bocking, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 26 de julho de 1608, em Bocking, Essex, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Bocking, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes родилась около 1554 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger Blakiston of Gibside было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Marley, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Hewes в 1568 г. в местности боккинг, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 26 июля 1608 г. в местности боккинг, эссекс, Англия и была похоронена в местности боккинг, эссекс, Англия.

sm.about 1554–before 26 July 1608: e tusa o le 1554–a'e le'I oo le 26 Iulai 1608

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes nació aproximadamente 1554, en Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Blakiston of Gibside, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Marley, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Roger Hewes en 1568, en Bocking, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 26 de julio de 1608, en Bocking, Essex, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Bocking, Essex, Inglaterra.
